items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of real-time status tracking for conversations and pending actions. However, the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or checks that confirm the implementation of this requirement. While the linked use case mentions the need for real-time tracking, there are no specific details or evidence demonstrating that this functionality is operational or validated.
